row score 0.93 (menu+app-switcher left, search center, alerts/tasks/settings/name right within a 60 px header)
column score 0.96 (title+selects row at y=12056, tabs row at y=12098, both 1240 wide centered)
row score 0.92 (title left @x=24447, controls cluster right @x=24630, baseline-aligned within 32 px)
row score 0.95 (3 visible tab labels left→right with 24 px gaps, indicator on Drifts)
column score 0.97 (action toolbar → filter bar → table, 20 px gaps, left-aligned within 0 px)
row score 0.90 (Ignore/Restore/Report Actions left cluster, Policy: Policy abc anchored right within 790 px)
column score 1.00 (info row at y=12272 + table body at y=12298, both 790 px wide)
column score 0.94 (panel header → subhead with pager → attribute sub-table → ignore-details, all 390 px wide)
row score 0.93 (Drift Details title left, layout/close icons right, centered within 50 px header)
row score 1.00 (4 columns Attribute|Relation|Expected|Detected, 98 px each)

agenda.name: Drift Management page
structural_hints: 1280x800 page frame
vertical stack: top dark nav / sub-header (title + selects + tabs) / body row (table + side details panel)
agenda.children_summary: FRAME Navigation/Header(top dark nav) + FRAME Navigation(sub-header w/ Drift Mgmt title, Project, Account, Tabs) + FRAME Main body(action toolbar + filter bar + drifts table) + FRAME Drift Details(side panel)

a11y_blocks: Use a single <main> region for the body content.
mapping.primary_recommendation_rationale: 1280x800 page-bucketed frame with stacked top-nav, sub-header, and body regions

agenda.name: Top dark navigation
structural_hints: 1280x60 dark navigation strip
menu+app-switcher left, search center, status+name right
agenda.children_summary: FRAME Menu+Switchers(Menu icon + Cloud Manager pill) + INSTANCE Nav Search(search input) + FRAME Status+Name(Alerts + Tasks + Settings + Name link)

mapping.primary_recommendation_rationale: pattern role 'banner' on a 60 px-tall dark strip with left/center/right slots → NavigationHeader

agenda.name: Cloud Manager app switcher
structural_hints: 240x32 dark pill with leading mini icon and trailing chevron
agenda.children_summary: INSTANCE _Navigation/AppSwitcher(Logo+Text + Button Icon)

candidates.summary: Top-nav product switcher pill with icon + label + chevron.

agenda.name: Top nav search

trailing info + star affordances
agenda.children_summary: FRAME Search(Icon + placeholder text) + FRAME 2 Icon(Information + Empty Star)

candidates.name: Input
candidates.summary: Text input. Set `search={true}` for the search-icon variant.

agenda.name: Top nav status + name
structural_hints: horizontal cluster of 3 icon buttons + 1 user link
12px icon glyphs
agenda.children_summary: FRAME Alerts(Icon/System/Alert) + FRAME Tasks(Icon/System/Task) + INSTANCE Icon/System/Settings + INSTANCE Action/Link

candidates.summary: Group of related buttons sharing context.

candidates.summary: Page-level header with title and actions.

agenda.children_summary: single TEXT node

candidates.name: Tabs
candidates.summary: Horizontal tab strip with active indicator.

a11y_blocks: Each tab uses role="tab" with aria-selected on the active item.
mapping.primary_recommendation_rationale: pattern role 'tab-strip' with 3 visible labels + active indicator → Tabs

agenda.name: Action toolbar
structural_hints: horizontal toolbar above the drifts table
Ignore/Restore/Report Actions clustered left, Policy split-button right
agenda.children_summary: FRAME Frame 1321315110(Ignore + Restore + Report Actions) + INSTANCE Action/Button(Policy: Policy abc)
agenda.reference_jsx_slice:
{/* 4147:20365 */}
<FlexLayout className="drift-action-toolbar" alignItems="center" itemGap="M">
  <Button type={Button.ButtonTypes.SECONDARY} disabled>Ignore</Button>
  <Button type={Button.ButtonTypes.SECONDARY} disabled>Restore</Button>
  <Button type={Button.ButtonTypes.SECONDARY} disabled>Report Actions ▾</Button>
  <FlexItem flexGrow={1} />
  <Button type={Button.ButtonTypes.SECONDARY}>Policy: Policy abc ▾</Button>
</FlexLayout>

candidates.summary: Group of related buttons sharing context.

a11y_blocks: Disabled state must be conveyed via aria-disabled, not just colour; preserve focusability for screen readers.

agenda.name: Drifts table

content_slots.header: Actions | Entity Name | Entity type | Rule Name | Severity | Status | Last Detected
items: Cluster abc | Cluster | System Rule 3 + System tag | High | Ignored | 1 hour ago
VM-Two | VM | Abc Rule | High | Open | 2 hours ago
VM-Three | VM | System Rule 3 + System tag | Medium | Open | 3 hours ago
VM-Four | VM | System Rule + System tag | Medium | Open | 1 Day ago
VM-Five | VM | System Rule 3 + System tag | Medium | Open | Nov 15, 2023, 05:21 PM
VM-Six | VM | Rule 2323 + Custom tag | Medium | Open | Nov 15, 2023, 12:45:21 PM
VM-Seven | VM | Rule 3423eds | Medium | Open | Nov 15, 2023, 09:45:21 PM
VM-Eight | VM | System Rule + System tag | Medium | Open | Nov 15, 2023, 10:45:21 PM

structural_hints: 7-column drifts table with row-level checkbox selection
row 1 (Cluster abc) selected — light blue (#E6F4FE) row fill
Severity column renders triangle (High) / diamond (Medium) mini status icons
Rule Name column shows clickable underlined link plus a trailing System/Custom tag
agenda.children_summary: INSTANCE Table/Column Actions(checkbox) + INSTANCE Table/Column Entity Name + INSTANCE Table/Column Entity type + INSTANCE Table/Column Rule Name (Tag variant) + FRAME Table/Column Severity + FRAME Table/Column Status + FRAME Table/Column Last Detected

candidates.name: Table
candidates.summary: Data table with sortable columns, row selection, custom cell renderers.

a11y_blocks: Wrap in role="table". Provide aria-label and aria-sort per column.
Severity icon must be paired with text (High/Medium) so screen readers don't lose the signal.
Row selection: checkbox column header acts as a select-all and must use aria-checked / aria-label.
mapping.primary_recommendation_rationale: pattern role 'table-column' on a 7-column table with row-level selection → Table (outer wrapper)

agenda.name: Drift Details panel
structural_hints: 430x596 white panel right of the drifts table
header / cluster subhead with pager / attribute sub-table / ignore-details section
agenda.children_summary: FRAME Header(title + layout/close icons) + FRAME Subhead(Cluster abc Custom Rul 3 + pager 1-5 of 5) + FRAME Sub-table(Attribute|Relation|Expected|Detected) + FRAME Ignore Details

candidates.name: Panel
candidates.summary: Right-side details panel with header + body.

a11y_blocks: Panel close button must have aria-label="Close Drift Details".

agenda.name: Drift subhead with pager
structural_hints: subhead row: bold cluster name on the left, page-of-results pager on the right
agenda.children_summary: TEXT 'Cluster abc Custom Rul 3' + INSTANCE Table/Table Controls(prev + 1-5 of 5 + next)
agenda.reference_jsx_slice:
{/* 4147:20473 */}
<FlexLayout justifyContent="space-between" alignItems="center">
  <Title size="h4">Cluster abc Custom Rul 3</Title>
  <Pagination current={1} total={5} pageSize={5} />
</FlexLayout>

all cells text-only, single-line truncation with ellipsis
agenda.children_summary: 4 INSTANCE Table/Column (Attribute, Relation, Expected, Detected) each with 2 INSTANCE Table/Table Cell rows

mapping.primary_recommendation_rationale: pattern role 'table-column' on a 4-column drift detail table → Table (outer wrapper)
